nasb.text: So the king said to Ziba, “Behold, all that belongs to Mephibosheth is yours.” And Ziba said, “I prostrate myself; let me find favor in your sight, O my lord, the king!”

esv.text: Then the king said to Ziba, “Behold, all that belonged to Mephibosheth is now yours.” And Ziba said, “I pay homage; let me ever find favor in your sight, my lord the king.”

cnv.text: 王對洗巴說：“看哪！凡屬米非波設所有的，都歸給你了。”洗巴說：“我叩拜我主我王，願我在你眼前蒙恩！”

ccb.text: 王就对洗巴说：“米非波设的一切现在都归你了。”洗巴说：“愿我在我主我王面前蒙恩！”说着，便叩拜大卫王。
